summary: Security regression found. PR #915 (path hardening, closes #640) merged at ~19:36Z but introduced issue #924 — URL-encoded null byte (%00) bypasses canonicalizePath rejection. High severity; undermines stated security goals. PR #923 (denial-retry-escalation invariant, closes #908) is open but blocked by Prettier formatting failure in monitor.ts. 3 PRs merged since last cycle: #922 (EM report), #916 (SQLite action_type index, closes #727), #915 (path manipulation fix, closes #640). Reassigning senior coder from #640 (done) to #924 (regression fix). Squad health downgraded to yellow due to security regression requiring immediate attention.

prs.title: feat(kernel): denial-retry-escalation invariant

mergedThisCycle.title: feat(storage): add decisions.action_type index for filtered queries (closes #727)
fix(matchers): harden scope matching against path manipulation (closes #640)

newIssues.title: fix(matchers): URL-encoded null byte (%00) bypasses canonicalizePath rejection
newIssues.note: Security regression — null byte check runs before URL decoding, allowing %00 bypass

newAssignments.reason: High-severity security regression from merged PR #915, needs immediate fix

notableIssues.note: 5 proposed invariants from analytics-invariant-researcher; #908 addressed by PR #923 (pending lint fix)
v3.0 gate issues (stranger test, ActionContext) — no assignment yet

blockers.description: Security regression in canonicalizePath — null byte bypass via URL encoding
blockers.impact: Undermines path manipulation hardening from PR #915
blockers.action: Assigned to senior coder for immediate fix

escalationRules.notes: Yellow due to security regression #924. Only 1 PR with CI failure (lint only). Blocker is new this cycle — not yet persistent.
